title: Spicy Velvety Cherries Crumble
description: A hangover-cure dish from Turkey featuring spicy cherries and a crumbly topping in a halal-friendly version.

ingredients.name: 2 cups pitted fresh or frozen cherries
ingredients.notes: Add 1/4 cup sugar for frozen cherries

ingredients.name: Pinch of cayenne pepper (optional for extra heat)

instructions: Prepare cherries by adding 1/4 cup of sugar to frozen cherries or pitting fresh ones.
In a saucepan, mix cherry juice and cornstarch. Stir until thickened, then set aside.
Combine cream, sugar, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper (if using) in another saucepan over medium heat. Bring to simmering point, stirring often.
Fold the sweetened cream mixture into the cherry mixture. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until thick enough to coat the back of a spoon.
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Mix flour and sugar in a large bowl. Add softened butter, mixing until crumbly.
Spread sweetened cream mixture evenly onto a 9x13-inch baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Press the crumble mixture over the top of the cherry filling to create an even layer.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly on top. Allow to cool before serving.
